heroSub: Welcome to Quantix.. Your Intelligent system for Salla management. Because successful come numbers, not expectations

features.title: Precision Measurements, Higher Sales
features.desc: A smart calculator that interacts with your products to provide instant, accurate area and quantity calculations, eliminating human error and offering your customers a professional shopping experience that builds trust.

features.title: Intelligent Inventory Monitoring
features.desc: A proactive system that precisely tracks product expiration dates and alerts you automatically before they expire, enabling smart decisions that protect your revenue from waste.

features.title: Sustainable Business Growth
features.desc: We combine calculation precision with smart inventory tracking to give you a clear view of your store's performance. Every calculation and inventory alert is designed to maximize your profits and ensure sustainable growth.

pillarsDesc: Quantix delivers two specialized sub-platforms designed to handle every dimension of your Salla store.

harees.name: HAREES
harees.desc: Harees Expiry Monitoring brings intelligent tracking of every product's shelf life — automatically flagging approaching expiry dates to reduce waste and protect your revenue.

mustashar.name: QIASAT
mustashar.desc: Qiasat Smart Measurement Calculator embeds a professional calculator directly in your Salla product pages — eliminating human errors and delivering accurate area, quantity, and cost calculations instantly.
features: Flexible calculation rules customizable to your products
Precision area and quantity calculation engine
Smart calculator embedded directly in product pages
Instant preview and seamless integration with Salla

footer.desc: Your intelligent system for Salla management. Because successful commerce relies on numbers, not expectations.
